creator: estellnb@yahoo.de
text:
gxine:
 The xine engine failed to start.
 No demuxer found - stream format not recognized

xine:
 -xine engine error -
 There is no demuxer plugin available to handle xy.mp3.
 Usually this means that the file format was not recognized.
 more ...:
  xine: found demuxer plugin: Elementary mpeg stream demux plugin
  xine: found input plugin: file input plugin
  xine: could not find demux for xy.mp3

Max Brazhnikov schrieb:
> Hi,
> 
> amarok uses libxine to play files. Could your test mp3 in any libxine based 
> player (e.g. multimedia/xine, multimedia/gxine)
> Anyway I don't think there's problem with amarok, it works fine for me.
> 
> Cheers,
> Max
>
